arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Real Madrid 1 - 2 Valencia; 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham—6: Played primarily through the middle as a #10 and nearly scored a Kaka-like goal dribbling through multiple players in midfield before toe-poking his shot just past the post. Did end up scoring to help rectify the issue but was substituted after 77 minutes with an overall poor showing.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid 1 - 2 Valencia, Post-game, La Liga 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Leah Revelle discuss: It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: Liverpool-bound Giorgi Mamardashvili claims Vinicius Jr REFUSED to pay up after penalty bet in shock Real Madrid loss - on huge night in La Liga title race
arts.sum: Valencia won away at Real Madrid for the first time since 2008 in an eventful game for Vinicius Junior. He failed to convert a penalty in the first half before scoring an equaliser in the 50th minute.

arts.ttl: Paris St Germain clinch title while Real Madrid slip leaves Barcelona four clear
arts.sum: Second-placed Monaco lost at Brest to leave PSG an unassailable 24 points clear in Ligue 1.

arts.ttl: Valencia GK: I won bet with Vini Jr. over PK save
arts.sum: Goalkeeper Giorgi Mamardashvili revealed on Saturday that he'd bet Vinícius Júnior that he'd save the Real Madrid forward's first-half penalty in Valencia's 2-1 win at the Santiago Bernabéu.
